case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. OSCAR OMAR VIVAS RAMIREZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-16-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-16-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY ENNY CUDNY, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT OSCAR OMAR VIVAS RAMIREZ IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY PAZ PERRY, COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, OSCAR OMAR VIVAS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, OSCAR OMAR VIVAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 SERVED JAN-16-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, OSCAR OMAR VIVAS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2017 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, OSCAR OMAR VIVAS
